sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khat veivei lungkia-in, kei ka om zela,
Zeisu it dingin ke'n ka hanciam zeel a,
Ahi hang Zeisu in hong it ka tel ciang,
Zeisu hong itna in hong lungmuang sak hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zeisu aw nong itna bang tawh kateh thei diam,
Zeisu aw na hoih na, paakte'n dem zolo,
Nang na minthanna leh na vangliatnate,
Zo heisa paakte'n zong hong dem zo ke'n teh.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mual kuam singnuai lakah, kei ka vak zeel a,
Topa aw nangmah in paaknamtui na hi.
Huihkhi hong nun ciangin, paak namtui hiauhiau,
Zo heisa paak bangin Zeisu namtui hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Luitui luang sialsial ah, kei ka vak ciangin,
Topa aw nangmah in nunna tui na hi,
Nong itna lianpi leh nang na sianthona,
Luitui luang sialsial te'n hong dem zo ke'n teh.
